hero.title: Build fullstack Remix apps with Prisma
hero.description: Prisma is the perfect database toolkit for Remix applications. Get type-safe database access, migrations, and data modeling that works seamlessly with Remix loaders and actions.

cards.title: Server-side data fetching
cards.description: Remix loaders run on the server, making Prisma the perfect choice for fetching data with full type safety from database to UI.

cards.title: Seamless mutations
cards.description: Use Prisma in Remix actions to handle form submissions and mutations with end-to-end type safety.

cards.title: Optimistic UI updates
cards.description: Remix's optimistic UI patterns work perfectly with Prisma's predictable data layer for instant user feedback.

cards.title: Type-safe by default
cards.description: Prisma Client generates types from your schema, ensuring your entire Remix app is coherently typed.

cards.title: Edge-ready architecture
cards.description: Deploy to the edge with Prisma Accelerate for ultra-low latency database queries worldwide.

cards.title: Developer experience
cards.description: Prisma Studio + Remix Dev Tools = the ultimate fullstack development experience.

how.title: How Prisma and Remix fit together
how.description: Prisma integrates seamlessly with Remix's data loading and mutation patterns. Use Prisma Client in loaders for data fetching and in actions for mutations, all with full type safety.

body.content:
Data Loading with Prisma

Remix loaders are the perfect place to use Prisma. They run on the server, so you have full access to your database. The data you return is automatically serialized and sent to your component.

Mutations with Prisma

Remix actions handle form submissions and mutations. Use Prisma to create, update, or delete data, then redirect or return updated data to your UI.

Error Boundaries

Combine Remix's error boundaries with Prisma's error handling for robust, user-friendly error states throughout your application.

why_prisma.title: Learn more about Prisma and Remix

cards.title: Build a fullstack Remix app with Prisma
cards.description: Learn how to build a complete Remix application with Prisma from scratch, including authentication and CRUD operations.

cards.title: Optimistic UI with Remix and Prisma
cards.description: Master optimistic UI patterns in Remix with Prisma for instant user feedback and better UX.

cards.title: Deploy Remix + Prisma to the Edge
cards.description: Learn how to deploy your Remix app with Prisma to edge networks for global low-latency performance.

quote.text: Prisma + Remix is my go-to stack for building modern web apps. The DX is unmatched!

cards.title: Remix Blues Stack
cards.description: The official Remix Blues Stack comes with Prisma pre-configured. Perfect for PostgreSQL-based apps with authentication, testing, and deployment setup.

cards.title: Kent C. Dodds: Remix + Prisma Workshop
cards.description: Deep dive into building production-ready Remix applications with Prisma. Covers data modeling, migrations, and best practices.

cards.title: Remix SaaS Template
cards.description: A complete SaaS starter template with Remix, Prisma, authentication, payments, and multi-tenancy built-in.

cards.title: Prisma in Remix Cookbook
cards.description: Collection of recipes and patterns for common use cases when using Prisma with Remix, from pagination to real-time updates.

cards.title: Fullstack Remix Course
cards.description: Learn to build a complete e-commerce application with Remix and Prisma. Includes video lessons, exercises, and project files.
